name: TeeBox 24/7 Golf
about: TeeBox Golf is a state-of-the-art indoor golf facility featuring 6 high-tech 4K simulators equipped with AI Trainers. The venue provides a premium, 24/7 golf experience with secure, keyless member access and flexible booking for non-members. Combining industry-leading Uneekor technology with expert PGA coaching, it is designed for players of all skill levels to practice, play, and improve their game year-round, regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with no weather or tee time restrictions
Industry-leading Uneekor XO2 launch monitors with precise data feedback
AI-powered training for personalized swing analysis and improvement

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy; food not mentioned as provided.
BYOB policy; alcohol not mentioned as provided.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor with Swing Optix cameras for comprehensive ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs, but high-quality golf balls and tees are provided by the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing guests to bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 1 hour for one person to play 18 holes of golf on a simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, TeeBox Golf is a welcoming environment perfect for beginners, including juniors, to learn and practice in a relaxed, private setting.
